input.background: Calculate the mean and standard deviation of each group depicted in each of the side-by-side stemplots in this problem. Discuss how these statistics relate to what you see.
input.question: (c) Comparison C: Group 1 | Group 2

output.answer: Group 1: x̄=50 and s=31.6. Group 2: x̄=70 and s=15.8. How statistics relate to what we see: Smaller central location and greater spread in Group 1.

Group_1_values.value: Values of Group 1 extracted from the stemplot (not explicitly provided in the problem, but assumed to be numerical data from the stemplot)
Group_1_values.description: Numerical values representing the data points for Group 1 in the stemplot.

Group_2_values.value: Values of Group 2 extracted from the stemplot (not explicitly provided in the problem, but assumed to be numerical data from the stemplot)
Group_2_values.description: Numerical values representing the data points for Group 2 in the stemplot.

Group.description: Categorical variable indicating the group membership of the data points.
